parameter_resolution_rules.rule: If a symbol is not an explicit input, resolve it from global_constants when available.
If a symbol is parameter-set dependent, resolve it from parameter_sets using the active parameter set.
If a local symbol such as eta or d appears in an algorithm name or body but is not explicitly defined, map it to the corresponding documented parameter family from surrounding prose.
If a concrete value still cannot be uniquely determined, do not guess; generate parameterized code.

examples.resolution: eta must be resolved from the active parameter set and caller context; eta may correspond to eta1 or eta2.
d may be a local algorithm parameter or a parameter-set value such as du or dv depending on caller context.
